Accursed Form.name: Accursed Form
Accursed Form.description: Transforms your Blood Curse into Accursed Form.Accursed Form (Cursed Form)Embrace your demonic curse for 30 seconds, entering an improved Cursed Form, increasing your attack power by 50% of your Agility and causing your melee attacks to reduce all healing done to the target by -20% for 10 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Acquired Taste.name: Acquired Taste
Acquired Taste.description: Casting Infuse or Vampyr's Kiss now generates 2 additional stacks of Pooled Vitality.

Adrenaline.name: Adrenaline
Adrenaline.description: Reduces the duration of bleed, root, and movement slowing effects against you by -25%.

Adrenaline Boost.name: Adrenaline Boost
Adrenaline Boost.description:
Increases the critical strike chance of abilities that require Cursed Form on enemies above 75% or below 35% health by 20%.

In addition, melee critical strikes now have a 50% chance to make your next Dark Liturgy or Bloodmoon Blast instant cast.

Agonizing Pain.name: Agonizing Pain
Agonizing Pain.description: Damage dealt by your Atherann's Anguish now causes enemies hit to bleed, dealing 1405 + 100% shadow SP Shadow damage over 10 seconds.

Aneurysm.name: Aneurysm
Aneurysm.description:
Counter the enemy's spellcast, preventing any spell from that school of magic from being cast for 4 seconds. 

Successfully interrupting an enemy heals you for 5% of your maximum health.

Animated Blood.name: Animated Blood
Animated Blood.description:
Animate 5 blood parasites to aid you in combat for 15 sec. 

|cFFE53935Empowered|r: Duration increased by 5 sec and you summon 1 additional amalgam.

Aortic Aegis.name: Aortic Aegis
Aortic Aegis.description: Your Blood Veil now applies to the party members of the target.

Aortic Assault.name: Aortic Assault
Aortic Assault.description: Extend the duration of your active |cffa966f0Cursed Form|r by 2 sec and strike nearby enemies every 0.50 sec for 3 sec, each strike causing 32 Physical damage.

Apotheosis.name: Apotheosis
Apotheosis.description:
Enter a blood trance, consuming Rage every sec to allow you to heal for 100% of all damage dealt for 30 sec.

If you run out of Rage the effect will end early.

Appetite for Blood.name: Appetite for Blood
Appetite for Blood.description: Increases the damage dealt by Bloodfang Bite and Claw Sweep by 20% against Humanoids and Beasts.

Arterial Bind.name: Arterial Bind
Arterial Bind.description: Place a pool of blood on the ground beneath enemies and allies, healing allies for 203 + 33% healing every 1 sec and silencing all enemies for 4 seconds.

Atherann's Anguish.name: Atherann's Anguish
Atherann's Anguish.description:
Unleash a hemoplague upon the target area, accumulating 30% of the damage you deal to affected enemies for 10 seconds, and then exploding for that amount of Shadow damage.

Damage caused by this ability cannot critically strike.

Atherann's Wickedness.name: Atherann's Wickedness
Atherann's Wickedness.description: Increases your Shadow damage dealt by 4% and increases your hit chance by 3%.

Barely Human.name: Barely Human
Barely Human.description: Increases your armor penetration and the damage of spells that cost health by 15%.

Battleweaver.name: Battleweaver
Battleweaver.description:
Casting Cursed Form abilities now has a 50% chance to generate 1 Blood Shard for 10 minutes, up to 8.

Dealing damage with Bloodbolt will launch 1 Blood Shard, dealing 18 + 15% AP + 35% SP Arcane damage to your target.

Black Heart.name: Black Heart
Black Heart.description: Your Vampyr's Rage now regenerates 20% of your maximum Rage.

Blood Banquet.name: Blood Banquet
Blood Banquet.description: Increases the damage of Valanar's Vengeance and Taldaram's Torment by 15%.

Blood Bond.name: Blood Bond
Blood Bond.description:
Bond yourself to an ally for 30 minutes, causing direct damage taken by the ally to generate 1 Rage and 3% base health and redirect their threat generated to you.

In addition, while out of combat, you and your bonded ally have 30% increased movement speed.

Blood Clot.name: Blood Clot
Blood Clot.description: Your Scarlet Delirium now deals 100% increased damage.

Blood Constructor.name: Blood Constructor
Blood Constructor.description: Increases the duration of Animated Blood by 1 sec per stack of Thirst.

Blood Craving.name: Blood Craving
Blood Craving.description:
Requires Mortal Form
You crave blood for 12 seconds, for the duration you cannot be interrupted or silenced, and you regain 5% of your maximum health and 15% of your missing Rage every 2 sec.

Blood Feast.name: Blood Feast
Blood Feast.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Drains the essence from up to 3 nearby enemy corpses over 5 sec to quickly regain 5% maximum health and Rage every 0.50 sec.

Cannot be used in combat.

Blood Howl.name: Blood Howl
Blood Howl.description: Taunts nearby enemies within 10 yds, forcing them to attack you for 5 seconds.

Blood Lord.name: Blood Lord
Blood Lord.description: Grants your Bloodsore a -15% chance to provide its benefits without being consumed.

Blood Mark.name: Blood Mark
Blood Mark.description: Increases the Physical damage taken by enemies within 5 yds of you by 3%.

Blood Moon.name: Blood Moon
Blood Moon.description: Your Animated Blood now spawns an additional amalgam.

Blood Pact.name: Blood Pact
Blood Pact.description: Increases your maximum Rage by 20 and you now regenerate 4 Rage every 5 sec.

Blood Parasites.name: Blood Parasites
Blood Parasites.description: Your Taldaram's Torment now generates 3 additional Rage per tick and increases spell critical strike chance against the target by 3% for 15 seconds.

Blood Plague.name: Blood Plague
Blood Plague.description: Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Ravenous Strike and Claw Sweep by 10% against Diseased targets.

Blood Prince's Command.name: Blood Prince's Command
Blood Prince's Command.description: Your Bloodbolt is now guaranteed to critically strike on enemies affected by Taldaram's Torment.

Blood Redistribution.name: Blood Redistribution
Blood Redistribution.description: Increases the maximum health restored by Fleshcraft by 25%.

Blood Runs Cold.name: Blood Runs Cold
Blood Runs Cold.description: Your Blood Pact now also increases your healing received by 20%.

Blood Rush.name: Blood Rush
Blood Rush.description: Periodic damage dealt now has a 20% chance to grant you Blood Rush. Can only occur once every 5 sec.Blood RushIncreases your haste by 20% for 5 seconds.

Blood Scent.name: Blood Scent
Blood Scent.description:
While in Accursed Form, you now deal 15% increased damage to targets below 35% maximum health.

Dealing direct damage to enemies below 35% maximum health now leeches health equal to 10% of the damage dealt.

Blood Shards.name: Blood Shards
Blood Shards.description:
Level 30 Passive
Shadow Damage dealt now generates 1 Blood Shard, plus 1 additional if it critically strikes, for 10 minutes, up to 8.

Dealing damage with Veinburst will now expend all stacks of Blood Shards, each dealing 18 + 9% AP + 15% SP Arcane damage to your target.

Blood Tap.name: Blood Tap
Blood Tap.description: Instantly regenerate 50% of your maximum Rage in exchange for health.

Blood Trails.name: Blood Trails
Blood Trails.description:
Periodic damage and healing now causes targets to spill a pool of blood beneath them.

Allies in a Cursed Form who move through the pools of blood gain Trail of Blood for 6 seconds.Trail of BloodMovement speed cannot be reduced below 80%. Movement speed increased by 20%. Damage dealt increased by 5%.

Blood Veil.name: Blood Veil
Blood Veil.description: Create a magical veil around an ally, absorbing 50% of incoming damage, up to a maximum of 810 for 8 sec.

Blood-Cursed Armor.name: Blood-Cursed Armor
Blood-Cursed Armor.description:
You now emanate an aura around you, increasing the Armor of party and raid members by 390.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Blood-Cursed Weapons.name: Blood-Cursed Weapons
Blood-Cursed Weapons.description:
Casting Crimson Tide now additionally increases the haste of all party and raid members by 5% for 15 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Bloodbender.name: Bloodbender
Bloodbender.description: Increases the effectiveness of Offerings by 20%.

Bloodbolt.name: Bloodbolt
Bloodbolt.description:
Hurl a bolt of blood at an enemy, dealing 72 Shadow damage, healing you equal to the damage dealt.

|cFFE53935Empowered|r: Deals 100% increased damage.

Bloodbound Etchings.name: Bloodbound Etchings
Bloodbound Etchings.description: Your Blood Shield now increases your health regeneration by 50% more.

Bloodcraft.name: Bloodcraft
Bloodcraft.description: Your damage dealt by Darkfallen Lament now applies Bloodcraft to affected enemies, reducing damage dealt by -2% for 5 seconds, stacking 4 times.

Bloodfang Bite.name: Bloodfang Bite
Bloodfang Bite.description: Bite an enemy, dealing 160 Physical damage and creates a |cffffffffBite Wound|r.@s:706654:0@

Bloodguard.name: Bloodguard
Bloodguard.description: Increases the duration of Blood Pact by 4 sec.

Bloodleaper.name: Bloodleaper
Bloodleaper.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Lunge by -10 sec.

Bloodmoon Blast.name: Bloodmoon Blast
Bloodmoon Blast.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Blast an enemy for 109 Shadow damage and generates Rage.

Bloodmoon Power.name: Bloodmoon Power
Bloodmoon Power.description: Your Liquify now cleanses all negative effects when used.

Bloodsoaked Offering.name: Bloodsoaked Offering
Bloodsoaked Offering.description: Blood magic infuses the target ally, increasing their Spirit by 17 for 30 min.

Bloodthorns.name: Bloodthorns
Bloodthorns.description:
Bloodthorns sprout from an ally for 30 min, causing 10 Shadow damage to attackers when hit.

Can occur only once every half a second.

Bloodwell Eruption.name: Bloodwell Eruption
Bloodwell Eruption.description: Increases the radius of Sanguine Rupture by 5 yds and its critical strike chance by 10%.

Bloody Claws.name: Bloody Claws
Bloody Claws.description: You now generate 20% increased Rage from damage dealt and critical strikes with auto attacks now reduces the cooldown of Animated Blood, Blood Veil, and Blood Pact by 1 sec.

Cardiac Arrest.name: Cardiac Arrest
Cardiac Arrest.description: Your Valanar's Vengeance now deals an additional 50% of its initial damage dealt over 10 seconds, healing you for 50% of the damage dealt.

Claw Sweep.name: Claw Sweep
Claw Sweep.description: Swipe at nearby enemies, dealing 38 Physical damage.

Clotting.name: Clotting
Clotting.description:
At the end of Aortic Assault's duration, all enemies in a 10 yd frontal cone suffer 600 + 50% AP Physical damage.

Damage dealt by this effect is increased by 25% against bleeding targets.

Coagulated Shield.name: Coagulated Shield
Coagulated Shield.description:
Protects the caster with a coagulated barrier, causing them to suffer no spell pushback from damaging attacks and reducing the duration of interrupt and silence effects by 30%. Lasts 30 min.

@ext: Only 1 |cffffffffShield|r can be active at a time.:ext@

Coagulation.name: Coagulation
Coagulation.description: Your Blood Shield now also dispels 1 bleed effect from you with each tick.

Coated In Blood.name: Coated In Blood
Coated In Blood.description: Increases the effectiveness of Blood Pact by 50%.

Coated In Darkness.name: Coated In Darkness
Coated In Darkness.description: Casting Bloodbolt or Bloodfang Bite now reduces the cooldown of your Blood Pact by -0.5 sec.

Corrupted Blood.name: Corrupted Blood
Corrupted Blood.description: When you use Taldaram's Torment on a Humanoid or Beast it now corrupts their blood, increasing your damage dealt against them by 10%.

Crimson Curse.name: Crimson Curse
Crimson Curse.description: Your direct damage critical strikes increase the damage the target takes from bleed effects by 30% for 15 seconds.

Crimson Etchings.name: Crimson Etchings
Crimson Etchings.description: Removes the health cost of your Blood Shield and Vital Shield.

Crimson Expedition.name: Crimson Expedition
Crimson Expedition.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Bloodbolt, Blood Shards, and Aortic Assault by 10%.

Crimson Feast.name: Crimson Feast
Crimson Feast.description: Every 5 second you remain in a Cursed Form now reduces the cooldown of your Bloodsurge by -5 sec.

Crimson Scion.name: Crimson Scion
Crimson Scion.description: Direct damage dealt now has a 10% chance to make your next Sanguine Mend within 10 seconds instant cast.

Crimson Terror.name: Crimson Terror
Crimson Terror.description: Your Transgression now grants spell damage equal to 50% of your Spirit for the duration.

Crimson Tide.name: Crimson Tide
Crimson Tide.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Create a pool of blood beneath up to 10 enemies within 10 yds of you, causing them to bleed for 212 Shadow damage over 15 sec.

|cFFE53935Empowered|r: Radius increased by 5 yds and costs 100% less Rage.

Cruel Intent.name: Cruel Intent
Cruel Intent.description: When you Lunge at an enemy you now strike them 3 times with auto attacks.

Cunning of Atherann.name: Cunning of Atherann
Cunning of Atherann.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 25% of your Stamina and Spirit.

Cursed Blood.name: Cursed Blood
Cursed Blood.description: Damage dealt by Taldaram's Torment now has a 20% chance to internally rupture, causing it to deal its damage an additional time to all enemies near the target.

Cursed Ground.name: Cursed Ground
Cursed Ground.description: Increases the cast time of Sanguine Rupture by 2 sec, but now when you strike at least 5 enemies it causes them to bleed out, dealing an additional 352 Shadow damage over 2 seconds.

Cursed Strikes.name: Cursed Strikes
Cursed Strikes.description: Increases the duration of Rotclaw and Hypovolemic Shock by 50%.

Dark Blood.name: Dark Blood
Dark Blood.description: Reduces the cost of your abilities that require Cursed Form and increases the healing done by Blood Rituals by -25%.

Dark Essence.name: Dark Essence
Dark Essence.description: Casting Cursed Form abilities or Bloodbolt will now heal allies affected by Blood Rituals for 114 + 10% healing every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

Dark Frenzy.name: Dark Frenzy
Dark Frenzy.description:
Increases spell haste of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, while a Cursed Form is active, your global cooldowns are reduced by -25%.

Dark Hunt.name: Dark Hunt
Dark Hunt.description: Increases your Shadow damage dealt by 10% against bleeding targets.

Dark Intent.name: Dark Intent
Dark Intent.description: When you Lunge at an enemy you now heal for 5% of your maximum health.

Dark Liturgy.name: Dark Liturgy
Dark Liturgy.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Form a blood bond, healing a friendly target for 118 and applying |cffffffffBlood Rituals|r to them, bouncing to up to 10 nearby allies, healing for less for each target struck.@s:706624:0@

Dark Mark.name: Dark Mark
Dark Mark.description: Reduces the chance to hit for enemies within 5 yds of you by -3%.

Dark Mending.name: Dark Mending
Dark Mending.description: Reduces the cast time of Sanguine Mend by -0.5 sec.

Dark Presence.name: Dark Presence
Dark Presence.description:
Increases spell haste of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases your spell haste by 3%.

Dark Sigil.name: Dark Sigil
Dark Sigil.description:
Increases critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, you now heal for 15% of all critical damage dealt.

Darkfallen Lament.name: Darkfallen Lament
Darkfallen Lament.description:
Chant a sinister ritual, healing up to 12 allies affected by Blood Rituals for 648 + 80% healing over 8 seconds and leeching 684 + 800% healing health from enemies within 10 yds over 8 seconds.

While active, you are immune to silence and interrupt effects, but cannot move.

Darkfallen's Embrace.name: Darkfallen's Embrace
Darkfallen's Embrace.description: Increases your spell haste by 3% and increases the range of your Sanguine spells and Bloodbolt by 5 yds.

Detect Life.name: Detect Life
Detect Life.description: Shows the location of all nearby Humanoids, Giants, and Beasts on the minimap.

Dissipation.name: Dissipation
Dissipation.description: Reduces the cooldown of Fleshcraft and the duration of the Sated debuff by -60 sec.

Dominion of Blood.name: Dominion of Blood
Dominion of Blood.description: Your Vampiric Fang now heals you for an additional 50% of the damage dealt.

Easy Prey.name: Easy Prey
Easy Prey.description: Increases the duration of Hemostasis by 1 sec.

Endure the Curse.name: Endure the Curse
Endure the Curse.description:
Reduce all damage taken by -30% for 10 seconds.

While active, taking damage that would reduce your health below 10% will instantly heal you for 30% of your maximum health. Can only occur once.

Enduring.name: Enduring
Enduring.description: Increases the damage of Bloodbolt by 25%, plus an additional 25% while below 35% health.

Enraging Howls.name: Enraging Howls
Enraging Howls.description: Casting Howl spells now increases the damage dealt and reduces damage taken by nearby party members by 5% for 10 seconds.

Enraging Wounds.name: Enraging Wounds
Enraging Wounds.description:
Level 40 Passive
Melee critical strikes now leech 46 + 18.5% Stamina health from the target, scaling with your Stamina.

Enthraller.name: Enthraller
Enthraller.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Valanar's Vengeance and Keleseth's Calamity by 10%.

Essence Harvester.name: Essence Harvester
Essence Harvester.description:
Being struck by an enemy while below 35% health instantly resets the cooldown of your Vampiric Fang and grants you Wretched.

Can only occur once per minute.WretchedGenerates 10 Rage and 1 stack of Thirst every 1 sec for 10 seconds. Vampiric Fang removes this effect.

Eternal Hunt.name: Eternal Hunt
Eternal Hunt.description: Increases your maximum health and reduces the cost of your spells and abilities by 5%.

Eternal Presence.name: Eternal Presence
Eternal Presence.description:
Increases the attack power of party and raid members by 5%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, you now gain attack power equal to 15% of the damage taken for 10 seconds. Can only occur once every 10 sec.

Eternal Resolve.name: Eternal Resolve
Eternal Resolve.description: Activate your eternal resolve for 30 seconds, sending you into a feral frenzy, increasing your melee attack speed, maximum health, and healing received by 50%.

Everhungry.name: Everhungry
Everhungry.description: Direct critical strikes now increase your haste by 10% for 5 seconds.

Everlasting Hunt.name: Everlasting Hunt
Everlasting Hunt.description: Damage dealt by Blood Shards now reduces the cooldown of Veinburst and Reave by -1.5 sec.

Excess Blood.name: Excess Blood
Excess Blood.description: Your healing done now has a 10% chance to heal the target for an additional 240 + 3% healing over 6 seconds.

Eyes In The Night.name: Eyes In The Night
Eyes In The Night.description:
Allies within 20 yds are protected by Shadow Colony, giving them a 40% chance to trigger a Call of the Darkwing when they take direct damage. Can only occur once every 5 sec.

If allies have less health than you when this occurs, generate a large amount of threat against the enemy that triggered it.

Fang Over Fang.name: Fang Over Fang
Fang Over Fang.description: Casting Bloodfang Bite now has a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Reave.

Fearmonger.name: Fearmonger
Fearmonger.description: Increases the tick rate and cost of Taldaram's Torment by -30%.

Feral Strength.name: Feral Strength
Feral Strength.description:
Level 30 Passive
While in Eternal Curse, you now gain 50% more attack power from Agility and Strength.

Festering Maw.name: Festering Maw
Festering Maw.description: Healing with Bite Wound now reduces the cooldown of Lunge by 1 sec.

Flesh Foundry.name: Flesh Foundry
Flesh Foundry.description:
Your critical strikes now reduce the cooldown of Fleshcraft and the duration of Sated on the target by -4 sec.

In addition, increases your critical strike rating by 15% of your Spirit.

Fleshbending.name: Fleshbending
Fleshbending.description:
Your critical strikes now increase the critical strike chance of all party and raid members by 5% for 10 seconds.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Fleshcraft.name: Fleshcraft
Fleshcraft.description:
Mend blood and bone, healing an ally for 50% of their maximum health and applies Sated.
SatedCannot be affected by Fleshcraft for 3 minutes.

Forbidden Power.name: Forbidden Power
Forbidden Power.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell critical strike rating by 30% of your Agility and spell hit rating by 5% of your Agility.

Gift of Lana'thel.name: Gift of Lana'thel
Gift of Lana'thel.description: Become blessed by Lana'thel, increasing your spell power by 25% of your Spirit and your hit rating by 4% of your Spirit.

Gore Barrage.name: Gore Barrage
Gore Barrage.description: Reduces the cost of spells that cost health and Animated Blood by -30%.

Gore Tome.name: Gore Tome
Gore Tome.description: For the first 5 sec after activating a Cursed Form, your Bloodfang Bite is now guaranteed to critically strike.

Gorge.name: Gorge
Gorge.description: Instantly gain 10 stacks of Pooled Vitality every 5 sec for 15 seconds.

Greater Bloodsoaked Offering.name: Greater Bloodsoaked Offering
Greater Bloodsoaked Offering.description: Blood magic infuses the target ally, increasing their Spirit by 40 for 30 min.

Greater Bloodthorns.name: Greater Bloodthorns
Greater Bloodthorns.description:
Bloodthorns sprout from all party and raid members for 30 min, causing 21 Shadow damage to attackers when hit.

Can occur only once every half a second.

Greater Sanguinary Offering.name: Greater Sanguinary Offering
Greater Sanguinary Offering.description: Establish a sanguine pact with all nearby allies, increasing their Stamina by 54. Lasts 30 min.

Grim Omen.name: Grim Omen
Grim Omen.description:
Critical strikes with Ravenous Strike or Bloodfang Bite, or using Howl spells, now triggers Call of the Darkwing.
Call of the DarkwingCalls 1 to 2 Shadow Bats to appear from the shadows and strike the target for 28 + 40% SP + 20% AP Physical Damage, healing you equal to the damage dealt.

Gruesome Rituals.name: Gruesome Rituals
Gruesome Rituals.description: Your damage dealt is now increased by 1% for each stack of Pooled Vitality.

Heart Rupturer.name: Heart Rupturer
Heart Rupturer.description: Increases the damage of Claw Sweep, Sanguine Rupture, Ravenous Strike and Bloodmoon Blast by 20%.

Heartbreak.name: Heartbreak
Heartbreak.description:
Unleash a powerful surge of blood, dealing 267 Shadow damage to an enemy, and healing 12 allies within 20 yds of the target for 252.

|cFFE53935Empowered|r: Increases your party and raid members attack or spell power by 110 for 20 sec, plus an additional 15 for you, scaling with level.

Heightened Reflexes.name: Heightened Reflexes
Heightened Reflexes.description: Increases your chance to dodge by 4% and your expertise by 5.

Hemal Excision.name: Hemal Excision
Hemal Excision.description: Cut into an ally's vital essence, siphoning all curse effects from them. You may reactivate this ability again within 10 seconds to place these curse effects on an enemy.

Hematoma.name: Hematoma
Hematoma.description: Your Bloodbolt now heals for an additional 20% of the damage dealt.

Hemoburst.name: Hemoburst
Hemoburst.description:
Requires Mortal Form
Unleash a powerful burst of blood at an enemy, dealing 1480 + 65% AP + 50% SP Shadow damage. This ability is guaranteed to critically strike against bleeding targets.

Extends the duration of your next Cursed Form by 5 sec for 30 seconds, stacking 2 times.

Hemoglobe.name: Hemoglobe
Hemoglobe.description:
Coalesce a powerful sanguine orb above you, healing up to 12 allies within 20 yds for 4247 + 84.38% healing + 337.5% Spirit + 262.5% Stamina over 15 seconds.

Generates 2 stacks of Pooled Vitality, and 150 Rage every 2 sec.

Hemostasis.name: Hemostasis
Hemostasis.description:
Trap an enemy in a blood orb, horrifying them in place for 4 seconds.

Reactivating this ability within 4 seconds, instantly pops the Hemostasis, dealing 137 + 43% AP + 103% shadow SP Shadow damage and reducing their healing received by -60% for 10 seconds.

Hypovolemic Shock.name: Hypovolemic Shock
Hypovolemic Shock.description: Induce your blood into an enemy to shock their nervous system, reducing their attack power by 60 for 15 sec and removing 1 enrage effect.

Infected Blood.name: Infected Blood
Infected Blood.description: Periodic damage dealt now reduces the enemy's movement speed by -30%.

Infection.name: Infection
Infection.description: Auto attacking a bleeding target will now infect the wound, increasing their chance to be critically struck from you by 1% for 6 seconds, stacking 10 times.

Infuse.name: Infuse
Infuse.description: Accumulates 10% of all damage dealt to the target and unleashes it after 10 seconds, dealing Shadow damage and absorbing healing done to the target equal to the damage done for 10 seconds.

Inhumane.name: Inhumane
Inhumane.description: Dealing damage with Aortic Assault will now launch 1 Blood Shard, dealing 18 + 15% AP + 35% SP Arcane damage to your target.

Invigorated Flesh.name: Invigorated Flesh
Invigorated Flesh.description:
Increases chance to hit with all spells and attacks by 1% for you and party and raid members.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Iron Claws.name: Iron Claws
Iron Claws.description: Allows Rotclaw's periodic effect to stack up 2 additional times for 50% longer duration and cause you to ignore 3% of the target's armor per stack.

Keleseth's Calamity.name: Keleseth's Calamity
Keleseth's Calamity.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Bend blood in an area, dealing 252 Shadow damage to enemies.

Each stack of |cffffffffThirst|r reduces the cast time of this ability and increases its damage.

Killer Instinct.name: Killer Instinct
Killer Instinct.description: Each point of Rage now increases the critical strike chance of Veinburst and Reave by 0.5%, up to a maximum of 50%.

Leeching Tome.name: Leeching Tome
Leeching Tome.description: Your Bloodbolt now leeches 50% more health, but it now costs 5 additional Rage.

Lifedrinker.name: Lifedrinker
Lifedrinker.description: Increases the damage of your Vampiric Fang by 25%.

Lingering Essence.name: Lingering Essence
Lingering Essence.description: Periodic damage and healing done now has a 50% chance to reduce the cooldown of Vampyr's Kiss by -1 sec.

Liquify.name: Liquify
Liquify.description:
Requires Mortal Form
Dissipate into a pool of blood, making you immune to damage from spells and attacks, but preventing you from attacking or casting spells and slowing your movement speed by -30% for 6 seconds.

Usable while stunned, feared or confused.

Malediction.name: Malediction
Malediction.description: Condemn an enemy, dealing 248 + 77.33% shadow SP Shadow damage over 12 seconds and increasing the damage they take from your next 5 direct damage spells by 20%.

Monstrous Hunger.name: Monstrous Hunger
Monstrous Hunger.description: Enrage for 10 seconds, causing the next 6 Bloodfang Bites to have a -50% reduced global cooldown and cost and to trigger Call of the Darkwing.Call of the DarkwingCalls 1 to 2 Shadow Bats to appear from the shadows and strike the target for 28 + 40% SP + 20% AP Physical Damage, healing you equal to the damage dealt.

Mortal Wounds.name: Mortal Wounds
Mortal Wounds.description: Your direct harmful critical strikes with spells and abilities now cause the target to bleed for 306 + 6% AP + 30% SP over 6 seconds.

Mucking Around.name: Mucking Around
Mucking Around.description: Reduces the cast time of Scarlet Delirium by -1 sec, but increases the health cost by 100%.

Night Feast.name: Night Feast
Night Feast.description: Each point of Rage now increases the damage of Bloodbolt by 1%, but its Rage cost is increased by 10.

Night Hunter.name: Night Hunter
Night Hunter.description:
Your Veinburst now has a 40% chance to not trigger a cooldown when cast.

Your Bloodbolt now has a 40% chance to refund half of its Rage cost when cast.

Night Hunter's Howl.name: Night Hunter's Howl
Night Hunter's Howl.description: Howl into the souls of nearby enemies, dealing 113 Shadow damage and slowing their movement speed by 60% for 6 sec.

Night Stalker.name: Night Stalker
Night Stalker.description: All damage and healing done is increased by 5% at night.

Nightmare.name: Nightmare
Nightmare.description: While above 50% maximum health, abilities that cost Rage now consume 2% of your maximum health to damage or heal your target for an additional 10% of the value.

No Mercy.name: No Mercy
No Mercy.description: Allows your Thick Pelt to affect an additional hit.

One Man's Curse....name: One Man's Curse...
One Man's Curse....description: Removes the health cost of Accursed Form and entering it now instantly restores 15% of your maximum health.

Organ Orbs.name: Organ Orbs
Organ Orbs.description: Each stack of Pooled Vitality now increases your Spirit by 3%.

Packleader.name: Packleader
Packleader.description: Casting Howl spell now enrages your summons, increasing their damage dealt by 10% for 8 seconds.

Petrified Legions.name: Petrified Legions
Petrified Legions.description: Physical damage you deal or take now has a 10% chance to trigger a Call of the Darkwing.Call of the DarkwingCalls 1 to 2 Shadow Bats to appear from the shadows and strike the target for 28 + 40% SP + 20% AP Physical Damage, healing you equal to the damage dealt.

Pooled Vitality.name: Pooled Vitality
Pooled Vitality.description:
Level 10 Passive
Spells that cost health now grant a stack of Pooled Vitality, stacking 10 times.

Mortal Form spells that cost Rage consume 10 stacks of Pooled Vitality to become empowered.

Predator.name: Predator
Predator.description: Your Claw Sweep, Sanguine Mend, and Sanguine Rupture can now strike 1 additional nearby target.

Puncturing Fangs.name: Puncturing Fangs
Puncturing Fangs.description: Your Bloodmoon Blast now generates 3 additional Rage per hit.

Purify Blood.name: Purify Blood
Purify Blood.description:
Emanate an aura for 15 seconds, causing allied players to deal 70% shadow SP additional damage as Shadow damage when they deal direct damage.

Applies Exhaustion, preventing you from benefiting from similar effects for 1 minute.

Rabid.name: Rabid
Rabid.description: Reduces the cooldown of Howl spells by -25%.

Rage.name: Rage
Rage.description: Increases your spell damage by 15% of your attack power and the damage dealt by Reave by 10%.

Raging Hunger.name: Raging Hunger
Raging Hunger.description: Triggering Pooled Vitality now also generates 3 Rage.

Ravenous Strike.name: Ravenous Strike
Ravenous Strike.description: Strike an enemy, dealing 47 Physical damage and generating Rage.

Reave.name: Reave
Reave.description:
Lacerate an enemy, dealing 125% Weapon Damage plus 68.

If the enemy is bleeding, below 35% health, or if you are behind them, deal 100% additional Shadow damage for each condition met.

Reckless Abandon.name: Reckless Abandon
Reckless Abandon.description:
Level 40 Passive
Each stack of Thirst now increases your critical strike chance by 1%.

Red Thirst.name: Red Thirst
Red Thirst.description:
Enrage allies within 40 yds, increasing haste by 30% for 20 seconds.

After being affected by this spell, allies cannot benefit from similar effects for 5 minutes.

Rejuvenating Shadows.name: Rejuvenating Shadows
Rejuvenating Shadows.description:
Nearby party and raid members receive 6% more healing. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, increases the health leeched by Bloodbolt by 50%.

Rotclaw.name: Rotclaw
Rotclaw.description:
|cffffffff2 Charges, 6 sec recharge|r
Ravage all nearby enemies, dealing 47 Shadow damage, generating Rage and infecting their wounds, causing them to bleed for 67 Shadow damage over 4 sec.

Sacrificial Rite.name: Sacrificial Rite
Sacrificial Rite.description:
Requires Mortal Form
Invoke a dark ritual, increasing your haste by 20% for 15 seconds.

While active, attackers are afflicted with Cursed Blood. Can only occur once per sec.

At the end of the duration, your healing done is increased by 15% and you are healed for 795 + 150% SP over 15 seconds.

Sanguinary Offering.name: Sanguinary Offering
Sanguinary Offering.description: Enact a sanguinary ritual with an ally, increasing their Stamina by 20. Lasts 30 min.

Sanguine Mend.name: Sanguine Mend
Sanguine Mend.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Mend an ally's wounds, healing them for 268.

|cFFE53935Empowered|r: Becomes instant cast and heals yourself for 50% of the heal value.

Sanguine Rupture.name: Sanguine Rupture
Sanguine Rupture.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Explode with boiling blood, dealing 46 Shadow damage to enemies and generating Rage for each enemy hit.

Sanguine Scion.name: Sanguine Scion
Sanguine Scion.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Sanguine Mend and Bloodbolt by 10%.

Sanguine Scripture.name: Sanguine Scripture
Sanguine Scripture.description: Upon exiting Accursed Form, you gain 70% movement speed and spell haste for 5 seconds.

Saturating Sutures.name: Saturating Sutures
Saturating Sutures.description: Your periodic damage and healing has a 15% chance to reduce the cost your next Sanguine Mend by -100% for 8 seconds.

Scarlet Delirium.name: Scarlet Delirium
Scarlet Delirium.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Flood the minds of up to 5 nearby enemies with visions of unraveling flesh, fearing them for 40 sec (8 sec versus players) while draining their life essence, siphoning 17 health every 3 sec.

Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

Screech of the Darkwing.name: Screech of the Darkwing
Screech of the Darkwing.description:
Your effects that trigger Call of the Darkwing now trigger an additional Call of the Darkwing.

Can only occur once per sec.

Shadow Howl.name: Shadow Howl
Shadow Howl.description: Let loose a dark howl that inspires your allies, granting immunity to movement impairing effects to all allies for 6 seconds.

Shadow Pact.name: Shadow Pact
Shadow Pact.description: Increases the effectiveness of your Shields by 50%.

Shadow Strength.name: Shadow Strength
Shadow Strength.description:
Casting Howl spells now deal 65 + 25% Stamina + 25% Agility + 10% AP Shadow damage to all nearby enemies and triggering Call of the Darkwing now reduces the cooldown of all Howl spells by -1 sec.

Can only occur once per sec.

Shadow Vigil.name: Shadow Vigil
Shadow Vigil.description:
Envelop an ally in darkness, temporarily reducing all threat for 8 sec.

While active, the target's stealth detection is significantly increased.

Shadows In The Night.name: Shadows In The Night
Shadows In The Night.description: While above 75% health, your damage taken is reduced by -5%.

Slaughterhouse Offering.name: Slaughterhouse Offering
Slaughterhouse Offering.description: Amplifies magic used against the targeted party member, increasing damage taken from spells by up to 30 and healing spells by up to 32.  Lasts 10 min.

Sovereignty.name: Sovereignty
Sovereignty.description: Damage dealt by Crimson Tide now grants you Sovereignty.SovereigntyReduces the cost of your next Bloodbolt within 12 seconds by -10% and causes it to strike 1 additional nearby enemy for each target damaged, stacking up to 5 times.

Spice of Life.name: Spice of Life
Spice of Life.description: Your periodic damage and healing now has a 10% chance to grant a stack of Pooled Vitality.

Swarm of Flies.name: Swarm of Flies
Swarm of Flies.description: Your Bloodbolt now refreshes the duration of Taldaram's Torment.

Taldaram's Torment.name: Taldaram's Torment
Taldaram's Torment.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Corrupt an enemy's heart, causing them to bleed for 190 to 200 Shadow damage over 15 sec.

Generates 3 Rage every time it deals damage.

@ext:Periodic damage dealt through this can critically strike.:ext@

Terrorizer.name: Terrorizer
Terrorizer.description: Increases the damage of Veinburst, Bloodfang Bite, and Claw Sweep on enemies below 35% health by 25%.

The Council Assembled.name: The Council Assembled
The Council Assembled.description:
Atherann's Anguish now costs -25 less Rage.

Taldaram's Torment now increases the damage of your next Valanar's Vengeance or Keleseth's Calamity by 3% per tick for 10 seconds, stacking 5 times.

Valanar's Vengeance and Keleseth's Calamity now reduce the cooldown of Malediction by -5 sec.

The Cup Runneth Over.name: The Cup Runneth Over
The Cup Runneth Over.description: Increases the spell power scaling of Bloodmoon Blast, Taldaram's Torment and Bloodbolt by 20%.

The Hunter and the Hunted.name: The Hunter and the Hunted
The Hunter and the Hunted.description:
Level 50 Passive
When you activate a Cursed Form you now charge to your target if they are within 20 yds. If they're an enemy you root them for 2 seconds.

Upon expiration, your Accursed Form can be reactivated to cause you to erupt in a burst of blood magic, leeching 364 + 33% shadow SP + 12.5% AP health from nearby enemies and teleporting you backwards.

Thick Pelt.name: Thick Pelt
Thick Pelt.description: Physical damage taken now reduces the Physical damage taken from the next attack within 10 seconds by -15 + 20% AP. Can only occur once every 5 sec.

Torture.name: Torture
Torture.description:
Increases the leech of Vampiric Feast by 50%.

Consuming at least 9 stacks of Thirst with Vampiric Fang now extends the duration of Transgression by 5 sec.

Transfusion.name: Transfusion
Transfusion.description:
Swap health percentages with an ally.

Increases the lower health percentage of the two to 40%, if below that amount.

Twisted Magic.name: Twisted Magic
Twisted Magic.description: Your direct harmful critical strikes increase the target's Shadow damage taken from you by 2%, stacking up to 5 times, for 12 seconds.

Ultra Instinct.name: Ultra Instinct
Ultra Instinct.description:
Direct ability critical strikes now increase your spell and ability critical strike chance and critical damage by 3% for 10 sec.

Each additional critical strike increases this by an additional 3%, but reduces its duration by -1 sec.

Uncanny Movement.name: Uncanny Movement
Uncanny Movement.description:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your Agility by 25% and your hit rating by 5% of your Agility.

In addition, Claw Sweep now generates additional threat.

Uncanny Speed.name: Uncanny Speed
Uncanny Speed.description: Increases your melee haste by 5% and your movement speed and mounted movement speed by 20%.

Unchained.name: Unchained
Unchained.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your damaging Mortal Form spells can now be cast while moving.

Universal Donor.name: Universal Donor
Universal Donor.description: Casting Infuse or Vampyr's Kiss now increases the healing received by all allies by 6% for 10 seconds.

Valanar's Vengeance.name: Valanar's Vengeance
Valanar's Vengeance.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Launch a powerful blood bolt at an enemy, dealing 279 Shadow damage.

Each stack of |cffffffffThirst|r reduces the cast time of this ability and increases its damage.

Vampiric Fang.name: Vampiric Fang
Vampiric Fang.description:
|cffffffffExpends Thirst Stacks|r
Steal 61 health from an enemy.

Damage increased by 10% for each |cffffffffThirst|r stack. 

Clears |cffffffffInsatiable|r and |cffffffffThirst|r stacks.

Vampiric Pools.name: Vampiric Pools
Vampiric Pools.description: When Liquify ends, you now leech 474 + 100% SP health from nearby enemies.

Vampyr Bite.name: Vampyr Bite
Vampyr Bite.description:
Brings a dead player back to life with 145% health and mana.

For the next 20 sec, the target takes 50% increased healing, but being damaged ends the effect. Cannot be cast when in combat.

Vampyr Lord.name: Vampyr Lord
Vampyr Lord.description: Increases the damage dealt by your Animated Blood by 35%.

Vampyr's Kiss.name: Vampyr's Kiss
Vampyr's Kiss.description:
Curse an enemy, causing them to bleed for 342 Shadow damage over 30 sec.

All periodic damage dealt to an enemy affected by |cffffffffVampyr's Kiss|r is replicated on them equal to 25% of the value.

Veinburst.name: Veinburst
Veinburst.description:
|cffffffffRequires Mortal Form|r
Blast an enemy, dealing 231 Shadow damage.

Deals 25% increased damage to bleeding targets.

Veins of Vengeance.name: Veins of Vengeance
Veins of Vengeance.description: Increases your chance to resist curse effects by 15%.

Visceral Magic.name: Visceral Magic
Visceral Magic.description: Adds 40% to the Armor contribution from items by Blood Shield.

Vital Shield.name: Vital Shield
Vital Shield.description:
Protects the caster with vital magic, increasing your Shadow and Nature healing received by 15% and restoring 2% of your maximum health every 5 sec. Lasts 30 min.

@ext: Only 1 |cffffffffShield|r can be active at a time.:ext@

Vitality.name: Vitality
Vitality.description: Increases your Stamina while in Eternal Curse by an additional 10%.

Vitality For Later.name: Vitality For Later
Vitality For Later.description: Consuming Pooled Vitality now heals up to 10 allies within 30 yds for 176 + 25% SP + 50% Spirit, scaling with Spirit and healing power.

Waves of Blood.name: Waves of Blood
Waves of Blood.description: Each tick of Crimson Tide now has a 10% chance to heal a nearby ally for 25% of the damage dealt.

Wicked Howl.name: Wicked Howl
Wicked Howl.description: Let loose a wicked howl, increasing your maximum health by 30% for 20 seconds.
